title: eleocharis mitracarpa
intro: Eleocharis mitracarpa, also known as the spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Eleocharis mitracarpa include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Eleocharis mitracarpa can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
